notes: Snapdragon 8 Gen 2. Settings.System keys verified on Odin 3 hardware (same firmware namespace); Odin 2 confirmation pending. fan_mode + performance_mode are int values flipped by AYN's own Quick Settings tile.

communityPresets.name: Underclock — Large
communityPresets.description: TheOldTaylor's aggressive cap. ~14W from ~20W in 1080p AAA, temps 50-60C from 90-100C. Reported by author; safety not formally verified.

communityPresets.name: Underclock — Medium
communityPresets.description: TheOldTaylor's middle preset. Less power savings than Large but more headroom for AAA.

communityPresets.name: Underclock — Small
communityPresets.description: TheOldTaylor's mildest underclock. Small thermal/power benefit, almost no performance loss.

notes: Snapdragon 8 Elite (Dragonwing). 2-cluster: policy0 (6 cores, stock max 3532.8 MHz) + policy6 (2 prime, stock max 4320 MHz). NOT 8 Gen 2 topology — no policy4/7. Three perf daemons must stop+chmod-lock around cpufreq writes or they race the value back; see TheOldTaylor scripts.

Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 (QCS8550 / kalama), Android 13. THREE CPU clusters: policy0 (cores 0-2, little, max 2016 MHz), policy3 (cores 3-6, gold, max 2803 MHz), policy7 (core 7, prime, max 3187 MHz). GPU Adreno 740 (max 680 MHz). fan_mode Settings.System key VERIFIED present on Thor firmware (value observed: 4). performance_mode key NOT present on Thor (Odin 3 has it, Thor does not) — perf preset switching goes through com.qualcomm.qti.performancemode / Game Assistant instead, so perfPresetAdapter is null here. scaling_max_freq is mode 660 owned system:system — no direct UID write; live tuning needs root or the one-shot Odin runner script.
Pocket 5 is passively cooled. Sysfs discovery for clocking only.

Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 (QCS8550 / kalama, mfr Moorechip), Android 13. SAME 3-cluster topology as AYN Thor: policy0 (cores 0-2, little, 2016 MHz), policy3 (cores 3-6, gold, 2803 MHz), policy7 (core 7, prime, 3187 MHz). GPU Adreno 740 (max 680 MHz). Storage YMTC YMUS9B4TF2D1C1 (UFS 4.0). fan_mode Settings.System key VERIFIED present (value 4). Vendor app com.rp.gameassistant owns perf presets (no performance_mode key). scaling_max_freq is mode 660 owned system:system — per-file SELinux denial observed (policy0 max denied, policy3/7 allowed) so monitor falls back to OPP bounds; live tuning needs root or one-shot script via the device's own runner.
Fan is controlled by AYASpace via private binder. SERVICE_INTENT action is a placeholder pending reverse-engineering.
Helio G99, passive. Sysfs clocking only.
